label: neither
rationale: 'the problem is those wamunyoro guys' blames a political faction without abuse or protected-group attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wewe ni malaya' is vulgar personal abuse of a politician, not a protected-group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'even if Luos demonstrate ... they'll not be allowed in government' excludes an ethnic group from power as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'the ignorant Kikuyus' attributes ignorance and tribalism collectively to an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'uncivilized Luos ... we will watch while William Ruto massacres them' ridicules Luos and relishes their massacre.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are ... the biggest consumers of fake news' attributes gullibility collectively to an ethnic group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kick the shit out of the fucking IRGC' calls for violence against a state military institution, not a protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'turn you into a tasteless cunt' is vulgar personal abuse of an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Weka hao tumbako kwa shimo ya mboro' is crude political abuse with no protected-group target.

label: offensive
rationale: Personal abuse of Omwansa ('shallow, emotional and stupid') with a coded 'machopi' aside that the text does not develop into a group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'Jaluo mjinga' directly insults a person by their ethnicity and 'Mnandi arudi sugoi' tells Nandi to go back.

label: neither
rationale: 'luos dont vote ... mtapaki opposition na kales' is dismissive ethnic-bloc electoral banter rather than an attack.

label: neither
rationale: 'why don't you blame hamas' argues about and condemns atrocities rather than inciting against a protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'blinded thick head Wamunyoro supporter' is personal abuse of a political supporter.

label: neither
rationale: 'Our issues is only with Okuyu in Mt Kenya West' states tribal political alignment without abuse or contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus can ... advocate for secession. Tribalists' collectively labels an ethnic group with contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'yeye ni bangi tu' is personal abuse of Salasya; the Luhya mention is neutral electoral framing.

label: offensive
rationale: 'uue hizo Nyoka na mayai Zake' is an eliminationist snake threat whose target is a locality, not an explicitly named protected group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'you're a Coward ConMan' is personal abuse of an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'What a stupid old man!' is a personal insult with no protected-group target.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Nyie ni wajinga na wapumbavu' abuses CCM officials, with 'wasenge' used as a slur-comparison rather than a group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'You cannot separate a Kikuyu from money' asserts a greed stereotype about an ethnic group collectively.

label: offensive
rationale: 'nyoka na mayai yake lazima iende' is a dehumanising snake trope whose target is not an explicitly named protected group.

label: hate
rationale: 'itugati joors tax Kenyans and send all the money to central' uses a slur and casts Kikuyu as collectively siphoning other tribes' money.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wewe Bure kabisa' caps political criticism of a CS with personal abuse, no protected-group target.
